revision.comment: Replacing Flag_of_Tuvalu_(1995-1997).svg with [[File:Flag_of_Tuvalu_(1996–1997).svg]] (by [[commons:User:CommonsDelinker|CommonsDelinker]] because: [[:c:COM:FR|File renamed]]: File name harmonisation, correction in dates.).
1 revision imported: mass importing wikipedia templates
Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude>"
revision.text: #redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23368769069|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{ {{{1<noinclude>|country showdata</noinclude>}}} | alias = Tuvalu | flag alias = Flag of Tuvalu.svg | flag alias-1976 = Flag of Tuvalu (1976–1978).svg | flag alias-1978 = Flag of Tuvalu (1978–1995).svg | flag alias-oct1995 = Flag of Tuvalu (1995).svg | flag alias-1995 = Flag of Tuvalu (1996–1997).svg | size = {{{size|}}} | name = {{{name|}}} | altlink = {{{altlink|}}} | variant = {{{variant|}}} <noinclude> | var1 = 1976 | var2 = 1978 | var3 = oct1995 | var4 = 1995 | redir1 = TUV | related1 = Gilbert and Ellice Islands </noinclude> }} <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Country_data_Tuvalu here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Country_data_Tuvalu for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{ {{{1<noinclude>|country showdata</noinclude>}}} | alias = Tuvalu | flag alias = Flag of Tuvalu.svg | flag alias-1976 = Flag of Tuvalu (1976–1978).svg | flag alias-1978 = Flag of Tuvalu (1978–1995).svg | flag alias-oct1995 = Flag of Tuvalu (1995).svg | flag alias-1995 = Flag of Tuvalu (1996–1997).svg | size = {{{size|}}} | name = {{{name|}}} | altlink = {{{altlink|}}} | variant = {{{variant|}}} <noinclude> | var1 = 1976 | var2 = 1978 | var3 = oct1995 | var4 = 1995 | redir1 = TUV | related1 = Gilbert and Ellice Islands </noinclude> }} <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
